mission_title: Kayock’s Study V2B.2 — Native In-App EPUB Reader

argv:
exec('from pathlib import Path
files = [
    Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\KAYOCKS_STUDY_BIBLIOTHECA_V1\study_server.py"),
    Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\KAYOCKS_STUDY_BIBLIOTHECA_V1\VERIFY_KAYOCKS_STUDY_V2B_2.py"),
]
for path in files:
    compile(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), str(path), "exec")
print("KAYOCKS_STUDY_V2B_2_SOURCE_COMPILE_OK")')
